title: NeuroSpark — AI-age brain-building
description:
Build the brain your kid will need in 2035. NeuroSpark turns five spare minutes into focused, evidence-backed brain-building. 15 brain regions tracked, 16 AI-age competencies, on-device adaptation, voice mode, sibling mode, caregiver invites, and zero ads.

Why parents love it
• Five minutes a day, generated each morning
• Mapped to all 15 brain regions, not just one
• Adapts on-device using rolling engagement
• Voice-first (no need to look at the screen)
• AI Counselor for meltdowns and milestones
• Privacy-first: no child PII ever leaves your device

Family plan $6/mo. Free tier forever.
promo: Updated weekly with new evidence-backed micro-activities. AI Counselor now in 12 languages.
